name: Content Collection
description: Responsive grid or carousel of manually selected Content Assets, or the latest content from a library folder.

attribute_definition_groups.name: Content Collection
attribute_definition_groups.description: Responsive grid or carousel of manually selected Content Assets, or the latest content from a library folder.

attribute_definitions.name: Content source
attribute_definitions.description: Choose manual IDs or automatically load the latest online assets from a folder.

attribute_definitions.name: Selected Content Asset IDs
attribute_definitions.description: Manual mode only. Enter one ID per line or separate IDs with commas; authored order is preserved.

attribute_definitions.name: Content folder ID
attribute_definitions.description: Latest mode only. The online Content Library folder searched by Shopper Experience.

attribute_definitions.name: Maximum items
attribute_definitions.description: Between 1 and 24. Manual mode uses the first IDs in authored order.

attribute_definitions.name: Content kind
attribute_definitions.description: Show all assets, explicit SFNext blog posts, or non-blog Content Assets.

attribute_definitions.name: Latest-mode sort
attribute_definitions.description: Manual selections always keep their authored order.

attribute_definitions.name: Layout
attribute_definitions.description: Render the selected assets as a responsive grid or a horizontally scrollable carousel.

attribute_definitions.name: Maximum cards per row
attribute_definitions.description: Cards adapt to the component container, including when placed inside toolkit columns.

attribute_definitions.name: Card image ratio
attribute_definitions.description: Aspect ratio used by every card image in the collection.

attribute_definitions.name: Surface
attribute_definitions.description: Semantic background surface applied to the collection.

attribute_definitions.name: Heading
attribute_definitions.description: Optional section heading displayed above the cards.

attribute_definitions.name: Introduction
attribute_definitions.description: Optional supporting text displayed below the heading.

attribute_definitions.name: Show image
attribute_definitions.description: Show the mapped content image, or a neutral placeholder when an asset has no image.

attribute_definitions.name: Show summary
attribute_definitions.description: Show the mapped summary as plain card text.

attribute_definitions.name: Show category
attribute_definitions.description: Show the mapped editorial category when available.

attribute_definitions.name: Show author
attribute_definitions.description: Show the mapped author when available.

attribute_definitions.name: Show publication date
attribute_definitions.description: Show the localized publication date when available.

attribute_definitions.name: Show reading time
attribute_definitions.description: Show the configured or calculated reading time for blog assets.

attribute_definitions.name: Card link label
attribute_definitions.description: Accessible call-to-action label used by linked cards.

attribute_definitions.name: Link behavior
attribute_definitions.description: Auto links blog assets to /blog/{id} and uses a configured URL field for generic content. Template substitutes {id}.

attribute_definitions.name: Link template
attribute_definitions.description: Template mode only. Example: /stories/{id}. The {id} value is URL encoded.

attribute_definitions.name: Empty message
attribute_definitions.description: Message shown on the live storefront when a configured collection has no matching assets.

attribute_definitions.name: Title attribute override
attribute_definitions.description: Optional Content attribute ID. The c_ prefix can be omitted.

attribute_definitions.name: Summary attribute override
attribute_definitions.description: Optional Content attribute ID. Markup is converted to plain card text.

attribute_definitions.name: Image attribute override
attribute_definitions.description: Optional Content image attribute ID. Unsafe media protocols are rejected.

attribute_definitions.name: Image alt attribute override
attribute_definitions.description: Optional Content attribute ID containing meaningful alternative text for the image.

attribute_definitions.name: Publication date attribute override
attribute_definitions.description: Optional Content attribute ID containing an ISO-compatible publication date.

attribute_definitions.name: Author attribute override
attribute_definitions.description: Optional Content attribute ID containing the author name.

attribute_definitions.name: Category attribute override
attribute_definitions.description: Optional Content attribute ID containing the editorial category label.

attribute_definitions.name: Link attribute override
attribute_definitions.description: Optional Content URL attribute used by automatic linking for generic assets.
